latin: Vox magna et terribilis clamavit: 'nolite attendere ad hominem post velum!' sed iam sero erat — canis velum retraxerat et hominem parvum et timidum revelaverat.
translation: A great and terrible voice shouted: 'Pay no attention to the man behind the curtain!' But it was already too late — the dog had pulled back the curtain and revealed a small, timid man.
